item.title: About
item.description: The story behind Ageless Skin Guide and our integrative approach to skincare

item.title: The 4 Types of Dampness Affecting Your Skin: A TCM Guide
item.description: Discover how TCM 'dampness' manifests in skin issues. Learn the 4 types, their symptoms, and science-backed solutions for mature skin over 40.
